jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at ProSport
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, ProSport in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ProSport:
ProSport is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport!
